result.stdout:
Unrecognized option character '?' at "-?".
Usage:

    atgit [<options>] [<command>]

Executes <command> on all Git repositories found in the tree of current directory.

Options:

    --add-to-path        Add itself to HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Environment\Path (Windows only).
    -f, --force          Force execution on all repositories (ignore non-zero exit codes).
    -l, --list           Only list repositories. Do not run any command.
    -v, --verbose        Enable verbose logging.
